description_long: This is a standard aluminum beverage can with a cylindrical shape and a slightly tapered top. The can is predominantly blue and features the iconic Pepsi logo, which consists of a red, white, and blue circular emblem and the word 'pepsi' in a modern, lowercase font on the front. The top of the can is metallic silver with a pull-tab opening mechanism. On the back, there is a block of white nutritional and product information text, along with recycling symbols and a barcode. The surface appears smooth and glossy, with no visible dents or scratches. The can is sealed and does not show any signs of liquid spillage or deformation.
description: A blue aluminum Pepsi can with a silver pull-tab top, featuring the Pepsi logo and product information text. The surface is smooth, glossy, and undamaged.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Pepsi logo and brand name prominently on a blue background with a silver pull-tab top.
description_view_1: Angled view revealing part of the logo and the start of the nutritional information text on the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full nutritional information, recycling symbols, and barcode on a plain blue background.
description_view_3: Side view with a partial logo visible and minimal text, mostly showing the blue can surface.
attribute_label_or_branding: Pepsi logo in red, white, and blue on the front, 'pepsi' in white lowercase letters, white nutritional and recycling information text on the back.
